mapper.select: select id, slug, title, summary, content_markdown, status, published_at, created_at, updated_at from post order by created_at desc, id desc
select id, slug, title, summary, content_markdown, status, published_at, created_at, updated_at from post where status = #{status} order by published_at desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into post (slug, title, summary, content_markdown, status, published_at) values (#{slug}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{contentMarkdown}, #{status}, #{publishedAt})
mapper.update: update post set slug = #{slug}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content_markdown = #{contentMarkdown}, status = #{status}, published_at = #{publishedAt} where id = #{id}
